productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Payton Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Mustard and blue check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with single button cuffs and mid-sleeve tab, a spread collar, buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt from arrow, with its crush-worthy hue is designed with an easy silhouette. Pair it with a pencil skirt, closed toe pumps and a scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
